definition.title: Real Housewives of Trucking (IP + Audience Expansion)
definition.objective: Penetrate female-skewed trucker-wife/partner segment. Build brand warmth before commercial offers. Brand repositioning from driver-facing operational to family-aware community brand. Funnel: Outriders Partners Club.
definition.target_audience: Trucker wives and partners (primary), women in trucking households. Secondary: male drivers who share with partners. Funnel: Outriders Partners Club.
definition.cadence: Ep 1 LIVE. Anj distributing to trucker wife FB communities + female-skewed paid targeting. Track engagement for Ep 2/3 g

campaign_card.target_audience: Trucker wives and partners (primary), women in trucking households. Secondary: male drivers who share with partners. Funnel: Outriders Partners Club.
campaign_card.campaign_name: Real Housewives of Trucking (IP + Audience Expansion)
key_messages: The video is the spark — the funnel is the fire
We built a universe, not a marketing video — scalable IP with merch potential
Apparel is tribe, tribe is referral, referral is members

initiatives: Short-form reels from Ep 1. Static character portraits. Apparel tie-in. Meme statics. FB community deployment. Ep 2/3 iteration.

_legacy_card.description: EP 1 CANCELLED — PRODUCTION COMPLETE. LIVE on YouTube. Internal grade: A / 9.4 out of 10. IP built. Universe scalable. Audience affinity first, conversion second.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Penetrate female-skewed trucker-wife/partner segment. Build brand warmth before commercial offers. Brand repositioning from driver-facing operational to family-aware community brand. Funnel: Outriders Partners Club.
_legacy_card.asset_links:
YouTube Ep 1: https://youtu.be/fGngFyEBkcU?si=7OX1UfilhgzUnJJP
White Paper: Strategic doc in Maverick.
Strategic Brief: Funnel flow + Outriders Partners Club.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: The wives are the heroes. The producers are the clowns. Meme-first. Affinity-first. Conversion second. Apparel is tribe. Tribe is referral. Referral is members.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Ep 1 fully produced. Apparel mockups zero until committed.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Short-form reels from Ep 1. Static character portraits. Apparel tie-in. Meme statics. FB community deployment. Ep 2/3 iteration.
_legacy_card.timeline: Ep 1 LIVE. Anj distributing to trucker wife FB communities + female-skewed paid targeting. Track engagement for Ep 2/3 greenlight.
